title: TelemetryEvent
description: Normalized telemetry event emitted by the orchestrator and providers.

type.description: Telemetry event kind emitted by the orchestrator or provider integration.

runId.description: Opaque run identifier associated with this execution event.

timestamp.description: Wall-clock event timestamp in Unix epoch milliseconds.

payload.description: Event-specific metadata. It must not contain prompt payloads or raw secrets.
